query: SELECT id, nickname, level, tier, bp_constitution, bp_strength, bp_defense, bp_agility, bp_magic, (bp_constitution + bp_strength + bp_defense + bp_agility + bp_magic) as total_bp, hp, max_hp, attack, defense, speed, magic_attack FROM game_player_pets;
